form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr1) over 1776m at Wagin beaten 7 m by American Monarch (2:13.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on April 2 at $9. At her previous start 7th (Sr2) over 2190m at Northam beaten 11 m by Il Bandito (2:48.00) in 4yo+ NR 45 to 56 on March 20 at $7. Can improve and has to be included among the main chances.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of three-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign failed to finish at Gloucester Park on December 19 over 2130m. Top pick if at her best.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr3) over 2100m at Bunbury beaten 12 m by Ta In Advance (2:35.10) in 4yo+ NR 60 to 70 on March 28 at $41. Two runs back won by a head when quickly away, (Fr3) at this track (1:23.90) beating Luke Attack in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on March 23 at $3.40. Will find this tough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground from the 500m to be beaten 63m.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fourth after showing early speed, behind Ekara Navajo at this track over 2185m in a 4yo+ NR 60 to 70 on March 16 at $14. Then a handy effort when beaten by 8 m finishing second behind Wesmedad at Wagin over 1776m in a 4yo+ 2-4 WINs M on March 27 at $2.30. Rates highly and is well-placed to take this out.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 5th (Fr6) over 2130m at Gloucester Park beaten 6 m by Delightful Peg (2:34.40) in 4yo+ 0-3W/17 0K stake M on March 20 at $151. Two runs back 2nd (Sr1) over 2185m at this track beaten 2 m by Our Lililou (2:40.30) in 4yo+ NR 65 to 73 on March 9 at $3.40. Finds a few better. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of four months. Finished off last preparation when beaten by 4.5 m finishing fourth after being driven well back, behind Captains Creek at Gloucester Park over 2130m in a 3yo NR up to 80 on December 13 at $8. Can open the campaign with a forward performance.
